input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.12.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.12.2
            TITLE: any error that results in a team over reporting a cost in their cost report will not be further

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.12.2: Any error that results in a team over reporting a cost in their Cost Report will not be further
S.3.12.2 Any error that results in a team over reporting a cost in their Cost Report will not be further 
penalized.

final_answer: Any error that results in a team over reporting a cost in their Cost Report will not be further penalized.
